transcript.text: Suicide needs to be legal now don't get me wrong that doesn't mean suicide should

Not condone suicide try to talk people out of suicide not necessarily have

We should just be trying to convince people who might be trying to might be

You were when you died which is a state of mind of hopelessness and despair so you'll

Number one and if they do try to commit suicide suicide and survive they
Probably weren't really trying to commit suicide in the first place and to
